basic_details.job_title: J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Jammu and Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Chief Vigilance Officer – CVO posts! Published at jkbanks.com, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age of 63 years and possessing a Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 5 years’ experience in vigilance/disciplinary matters can apply online from 13 May 2026 to 24 May 2026. Find all details about the J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer – CVO 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, online form, and notificati

qualification.details: Chief Vigilance Officer - CVO: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University/ Institute. Minimum of five (05) years' experience in vigilance / disciplinary matters, of which at least three (03) years shall be at the level of General Manager or above. Must have an established track record of unimpeachable integrity, demonstrated professional competence, and the ability to command organizational confidence. No major or minor penalty should have been imposed during the course of the candidate's service career. Should be either a serving General Manager of a Public Sector Bank or should have retired from a Public Sector Bank at the level of General Manager or above.

salary_details.details: Basic Salary: Rs. 2,47,751 (Monthly) CTC: Rs. 57.36 Lakh (Approx.)

selection_process: Shortlisting of applicants on the basis of suitability
experience and qualification. Interview and personal interaction.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer - CVO Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of J&K Bank to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the J&K Bank CVO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) position at J&K Bank is 24th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CVO post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) role at J&K Bank, candidates must possess a Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University or Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Chief Vigilance Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) position at J&K Bank is 63 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CVO post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) post will receive a basic salary of Rs. 2,47,751 per month, with an approximate CTC of Rs. 57.36 Lakh annually.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the J&K Bank CVO recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the J&K Bank's official website. The application process involves filling out the online form and submitting credentials along with an updated CV via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the J&K Bank CVO recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 1000/- (including GST) for all categories of candidates applying for the Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) position at J&K Bank.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required experience for the CVO role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum of five years of experience in vigilance or disciplinary matters, with at least three years at the General Manager level or above in a Public Sector Bank.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Chief Vigilance Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their suitability, eligibility, experience, and qualifications, followed by an interview and personal interaction.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the contract for the CVO position?
faq.answer: The Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) position at J&K Bank is offered on a contractual basis for a period of 3 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the J&K Bank Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) recruitment can be found on the bank's official website under the careers section or through the direct link provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
